data.title: Fermeate Raises $2M Seed to Improve Fermentation with Light
data.description: In San Francisco, Fermeate, an industrial biotechnology company focusing on optogenetic control for large-scale precision fermentation, has revealed a milestone achievement in securing a $2 million Seed round. This funding was spearheaded by Newfund Capital and saw contributions from various notable investors including SOSV, Ajinomoto Group Ventures, Ki Tua Fund, Heuristic Capital Partners, Momentum Capital, Plug & Play, Tesserakt Ventures, and Ag Startup Engine. The financial injection is expected to bolster Fermeate's goal of revolutionizing unit economics to facilitate cost parity in the industry.

data.title: Dynatrace Acknowledges Shareholder Letter and Highlights Continued Value Creation
data.description: In a recent statement, Dynatrace (NYSE: DT), a prominent AI-powered observability platform, addressed the press release and letter from Starboard Value LP. The Board of Directors and management at Dynatrace prioritize the company and shareholders' best interests. They actively seek engagement with shareholders to enhance overall value. This commitment is reflected in their efforts to collaborate and communicate effectively with shareholders, highlighting a dedication to mutual growth and success.

data.title: Tokyo Dome Giants Games Positioned as Tourism Content for International Visitors
data.description: Digital signage has been introduced for the first time at Haneda Airport in Tokyo on April 28, 2026. This move comes amid the increasing influx of international visitors to Japan. The Tokyo Yomiuri Giants are leveraging this opportunity to promote Giants games at Tokyo Dome as a unique experience for tourists. The initiative aims to target the large audience passing through the airport, with the potential to engage a significant number of visitors from overseas.

data.title: SAS survey: Industry leaders on the quantum AI cusp
data.description: In the near future, SAS is set to introduce a new offering aimed at providing organizations with quantum artificial intelligence to achieve tangible returns on investment. The anticipated launch is scheduled to take place at SAS Innovate event in Dallas on April 28, 2026. With the stabilization of the supply chain for quantum hardware, numerous experts predict that this cutting-edge technology will soon become widely adopted and fully operational for practical use within various sectors.

data.title: 72% of Workers Say Their Company Is Thriving – But Nearly Half Say Work Was Better in the Past
data.description: Workhuman, a top employee recognition provider, has unveiled the Humans at Work Barometer, a comprehensive global study involving over 6,000 workers from 10 different countries. The research delves into the status of employee experience, trust, recognition, and organizational preparedness for AI integration. Titled Elevating Humans in an Era of Disruption, the report uncovers a notable contradiction within the contemporary workplace - while organizations are flourishing, employees are facing significant challenges.

data.title: Box Launches Box Automate to Orchestrate Agentic Workflows
data.description: Box, Inc., a prominent Intelligent Content Management platform, has introduced Box Automate for general use. This workflow automation solution, designed to enhance business outcomes with AI, is now accessible to users. Box Automate streamlines work processes by efficiently distributing tasks among individuals, Box Agents, and organizational systems. This end-to-end automation tool eliminates disjointed workflows and boosts enterprise productivity at scale.

data.title: Halter Launches World-First Virtual Fencing via Satellite, Unlocking Ranch Management Anywhere
data.description: In Boulder, Colorado, Halter, a prominent digital operating system for pasture-based ranches, unveiled a groundbreaking development in the form of direct-to-satellite connectivity for its intelligent cattle collars. This innovative launch signifies a global first as it eliminates the necessity for cell towers or on-ranch infrastructure. Leveraging Starlink, this state-of-the-art technology empowers ranchers to oversee their cattle from any location with sky visibility. Alongside this advancement, Halter introduced a comprehensive set of novel tools dedicated to reproduction, animal behavior analysis, and precise pasture management. This extensive release marks a significant stride in the agriculture technology sector.

data.title: Five Hundredth Urology Research Site Joins Anova’s Global Urology Research Network
data.description: In London and Chicago, Anova Enterprises, Inc. revealed the enhancement of a virtual urology research network through its AnovaOS® platform. This network, comprising verified top-tier urology research sites, has achieved a significant breakthrough by enrolling the 500th site. Anova's exclusive clinical research technology platform, AnovaOS®, enables smooth cooperation and efficient study procedures.

data.title: CorroHealth Honored As Stevie® Award Winner In 2026 American Business Awards®
data.description: In Plano, Texas on April 28, 2026, CorroHealth, a prominent revenue cycle technology firm, secured a Silver Stevie® Award in the Health Provider sector at The 24th Annual American Business Awards®. The coveted American Business Awards honor top businesses in the U.S, with CorroHealth's notable achievement showcasing their excellence in this field.

data.title: New Video Enhancer -- MiniTool Released Video Converter 4.7
data.description: MiniTool Software Limited, based in Vancouver, BC, launched MiniTool Video Converter 4.7, introducing the Video Enhancer feature. One of the main features of this new version is the ability to enhance video resolution to 4K by reconstructing pixels. Additionally, the software offers optimization for anime content. This release provides users with an enhanced video conversion experience.

data.title: Zenoti Expands Its AI Workforce: Purpose-Built AI Agents for Every Medspa Workflow
data.description: Zenoti is bolstering the medspa workforce by introducing new AI agents to oversee various operations such as campaigns, consultations, front desk duties, and treatment room management. The AI agents are designed to seamlessly run the entire business without any interruptions between systems. The company is based in Bellevue, Washington, and made this announcement on April 28, 2026. Zenoti is known as the AI-Powered Growth Platform for the beauty industry, reinforcing its commitment to innovation and efficiency.

data.title: This Mother's Day, Give Her Support That Stays--with LiberNovo Omni
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Los Angeles, LiberNovo, an ergonomic innovator, is honoring everyday heroes this Mother's Day by offering meaningful support. Show your appreciation for the mothers in your life by providing them with support that is always there for them when no one else is around.
